scripts.seed:emulator: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs -- firebase emulators:exec --only auth,firestore --project demo-careercopilot "node scripts/seed-emulator.mjs"
scripts.seed:web3-preview: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs -- firebase emulators:exec --only auth,firestore --project demo-careercopilot "node scripts/seed-emulator.mjs && node scripts/seed-web3-preview.mjs"
scripts.seed:ats-preview: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs -- firebase emulators:exec --only auth,firestore --project demo-careercopilot "node scripts/seed-emulator.mjs && node scripts/seed-ats-preview.mjs"
scripts.smoke:auth-routing: npm --prefix functions run build && node scripts/run-with-env.mjs -- firebase emulators:exec --only auth,firestore,functions --project demo-careercopilot "node scripts/auth-routing-smoke.mjs"
scripts.smoke:sourcing-outreach: npm --prefix functions run build && node scripts/run-with-env.mjs -- firebase emulators:exec --only auth,firestore,functions --project demo-careercopilot "node scripts/sourcing-outreach-smoke.mjs"
scripts.smoke:hiring-loop: npm --prefix functions run build && node scripts/run-with-env.mjs -- firebase emulators:exec --only auth,firestore,functions --project demo-careercopilot "node scripts/hiring-loop-smoke.mjs"
scripts.smoke:billing-credits: npm run prepare:emulator-secrets && node scripts/run-with-env.mjs BILLING_SIMULATION=true -- npm --prefix functions run build && node scripts/run-with-env.mjs BILLING_SIMULATION=true -- firebase emulators:exec --only auth,firestore,functions --project demo-careercopilot "node scripts/billing-credits-smoke.mjs"
scripts.smoke:aiproxy-guard: npm --prefix functions run build && node scripts/run-with-env.mjs -- firebase emulators:exec --only auth,firestore,functions --project demo-careercopilot "node scripts/aiproxy-guard-smoke.mjs"
scripts.smoke:dialogs: npm --prefix functions run build && node scripts/run-with-env.mjs -- firebase emulators:exec --only auth,firestore,functions --project demo-careercopilot "node scripts/dialog-positioning-smoke.mjs"
scripts.smoke:overlays: npm --prefix functions run build && node scripts/run-with-env.mjs -- firebase emulators:exec --only auth,firestore,functions --project demo-careercopilot "node scripts/overlay-collision-smoke.mjs"
scripts.smoke:account-profile: npm --prefix functions run build && node scripts/run-with-env.mjs -- firebase emulators:exec --only auth,firestore,functions --project demo-careercopilot "node scripts/account-profile-smoke.mjs"
scripts.smoke:navigation-ui: npm --prefix functions run build && node scripts/run-with-env.mjs -- firebase emulators:exec --only auth,firestore,functions --project demo-careercopilot "node scripts/navigation-ui-smoke.mjs"
scripts.smoke:tool-execution: npm --prefix functions run build && node scripts/run-with-env.mjs E2E_LLM_STUB=true VITE_FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_URL=http://127.0.0.1:9198 VITE_FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_PORT=8079 VITE_FIREBASE_FUNCTIONS_EMULATOR_PORT=5002 VITE_FIREBASE_STORAGE_EMULATOR_PORT=9196 -- firebase emulators:exec --config firebase.qa.json --only auth,firestore,functions,storage --project demo-careercopilot "node scripts/tool-execution-smoke.mjs"
scripts.smoke:resume-preview: npm --prefix functions run build && node scripts/run-with-env.mjs -- firebase emulators:exec --only auth,firestore,functions --project demo-careercopilot "node scripts/resume-preview-smoke.mjs"
scripts.smoke:web3-preview: npm --prefix functions run build && node scripts/run-with-env.mjs -- firebase emulators:exec --only auth,firestore,functions --project demo-careercopilot "node scripts/web3-preview-smoke.mjs"
scripts.smoke:runtime-critical: npm run prepare:emulator-secrets && node scripts/run-with-env.mjs BILLING_SIMULATION=true -- npm --prefix functions run build && node scripts/run-with-env.mjs BILLING_SIMULATION=true -- firebase emulators:exec --only auth,firestore,functions --project demo-careercopilot "node scripts/run-all-smokes.mjs"
scripts.test:rules: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs -- firebase emulators:exec --only firestore,storage --project demo-careercopilot "vitest run tests/firestore.rules.test.ts tests/storage.rules.test.ts"
scripts.test:callables: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs -- firebase emulators:exec --only firestore --project demo-careercopilot "vitest run tests/jobPostings.callable.test.ts tests/recentApplications.callable.test.ts tests/adminCreditAdjustment.callable.test.ts tests/aiIdempotency.callable.test.ts tests/apiPlatform.callable.test.ts tests/appBaseUrlConfig.callable.test.ts tests/applicationMessages.callable.test.ts tests/applicationStatus.callable.test.ts tests/bulkApplicationActions.callable.test.ts tests/cancelSubscription.callable.test.ts tests/creditRefundRecovery.callable.test.ts tests/discoverTalent.callable.test.ts tests/interviews.callable.test.ts tests/jobApplications.callable.test.ts tests/resumePiiAccess.callable.test.ts tests/revenueControls.callable.test.ts tests/scorecards.callable.test.ts tests/simulatedCheckout.callable.test.ts tests/sourcingOutreach.callable.test.ts tests/stripeBilling.callable.test.ts tests/stripeRedirectUrl.test.ts tests/usageCounters.callable.test.ts tests/web3Config.callable.test.ts"
scripts.test:coverage: vitest run tests/sessionTransitions.test.ts tests/navigationDecisions.test.ts tests/businessAccess.test.ts tests/applicationPipeline.test.ts tests/resumePreview.test.ts tests/skillMatch.test.ts tests/toolUtils.test.ts --coverage
scripts.test:e2e: npm --prefix functions run build && node scripts/run-with-env.mjs E2E_LLM_STUB=true -- firebase emulators:exec --only auth,firestore,functions --project demo-careercopilot "node scripts/seed-emulator.mjs && node scripts/seed-ats-preview.mjs && playwright test"
scripts.test:e2e:employer-ats: npm --prefix functions run build && node scripts/run-with-env.mjs E2E_LLM_STUB=true VITE_FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_URL=http://127.0.0.1:9198 VITE_FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_PORT=8079 VITE_FIREBASE_FUNCTIONS_EMULATOR_PORT=5002 -- firebase emulators:exec --config firebase.qa.json --only auth,firestore,functions --project demo-careercopilot "node scripts/seed-emulator.mjs && node scripts/seed-ats-preview.mjs && playwright test e2e/employer-ats.spec.ts"
scripts.loadtest:baseline: npm --prefix functions run build && node scripts/run-with-env.mjs E2E_LLM_STUB=true -- firebase emulators:exec --only auth,firestore,functions --project demo-careercopilot "node loadtest/setup-and-run.mjs"
